summary: PR 2609 matched and linked the item draw translation unit by changing configure.py to mark melee/it/itdraw.c as Matching, cleaning up src/melee/it/itdraw.c around it_8026EECC, and adjusting symbol metadata for nearby .sdata/.sdata2 entries. Bot output reports 2 new matches: it_8026EECC reaching 100.00% and main/melee/it/itdraw .sdata reaching 100.00%.

key_files.role: Primary decomp source change for it_8026EECC and helper inlines.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/itdraw.c hunk around it_8026EECC_inline_1/2/3/0 and it_8026EECC
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot reports it_8026EECC 99.41% to 100.00%

key_files.role: Changed itdraw.c object from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py MatchingFor changes Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/itdraw.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/it/itdraw.c")

key_files.role: Adjusted .sdata/.sdata2 symbol metadata used by the match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_804DC6B0 global symbol changed to local @275 at .sdata2:0x804DC6B0

what_changed.text: Marked melee/it/itdraw.c as Matching in configure.py.
Replaced repeated direct gobj->user_data item access with GET_ITEM(gobj) in several it_8026EECC helper paths.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_8026EECC_inline_1/2/3/0 and it_8026EECC changed Item* ip initialization to GET_ITEM(gobj)

what_changed.text: Collapsed temporary Vec3* new_pos assignments into ternary arguments to it_8026EB18.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_8026EECC_inline_1/2/3 remove new_pos local and call it_8026EB18(gobj, arg1, ip->xDCF_flag.b7 ? pos : NULL)

what_changed.text: Factored duplicated Camera_80031060 switch logic into static inline it_8026EECC_inline_sw and called it from both branches in it_8026EECC.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: duplicated switch blocks replaced by it_8026EECC_inline_sw(gobj, arg1, &pos)
raw_diff: deleted PAD_STACK(48) line in it_8026EECC

what_changed.text: Updated symbols metadata: it_804D5168 size changed from 0x8 to 0x4, and .sdata2 address 0x804DC6B0 changed from global it_804DC6B0 to local @275.

smart_moves.text: Used a small static inline helper to express a duplicated switch once, reducing repeated control-flow while preserving the two call sites.
Removed a stack-padding tactic after the source cleanup matched, which aligns with keeping matching tactics narrow and temporary.
Used project item accessor GET_ITEM where item user_data is read, improving typed/readable access over repeated raw gobj->user_data expressions.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a repeated switch body appears in multiple branches of a matching function, a static inline helper can be a match-preserving way to remove duplicated generated-looking control flow.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: duplicated Camera_80031060 switches replaced by it_8026EECC_inline_sw

decomp_lessons.lesson: Simple select-like pointer setup may be expressible as a ternary argument rather than a temporary initialized to NULL and conditionally assigned.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: new_pos local removed and replaced with ip->xDCF_flag.b7 ? pos : NULL

decomp_lessons.lesson: A PAD_STACK used in nonmatching source should be revisited after structural cleanup; in this PR it was removed while the function reached a reported 100.00% match.

naming_conventions.text: Retained address-style function names such as it_8026EECC and helper suffixes such as it_8026EECC_inline_1, avoiding unsupported semantic renames.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: function and helper names remain address-style

naming_conventions.text: Used short local role names already present in item code style, especially ip for Item*.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Item* ip local retained across helpers and it_8026EECC

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Inline helper extraction for repeated switch dispatch on Camera_80031060.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added static inline void it_8026EECC_inline_sw(HSD_GObj* gobj, s32 arg1, Vec3* pos)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Ternary expression for optional Vec3* argument to avoid extra temporary local.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_8026EB18 calls use ip->xDCF_flag.b7 ? pos : NULL

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Symbol metadata correction for data matching/linking.
result_evidence: text_corpus: bot reports .sdata for main/melee/it/itdraw 66.67% to 100.00%

review_feedback.text: No human review comments were present in the loaded PR slice.
Automated bot report recorded matched and linked code/data progress, including it_8026EECC reaching 100.00%.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR number/title/author/state/merge timestamps and changed files
raw_diff: complete diff for three changed files
text_corpus: bot report with match/link percentages and new matches
notes: PR body is empty, so author rationale is not available.
There are no loaded human review comments; reviewer intent cannot be inferred.
The automated report supports match results, but no local build logs beyond the bot summary are present in the slice.
The diff supports what changed, but not why specific symbol metadata values were chosen beyond match/data report evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Factor duplicated switch dispatch into a static inline helper when matching supports it
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR2609, duplicated Camera_80031060 switch blocks in it_8026EECC were replaced by static inline it_8026EECC_inline_sw, and the bot reported it_8026EECC reached 100.00%. This is evidence for trying helper extraction on repeated switch dispatch in item draw code, not a universal requirement.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_8026EECC_inline_sw added and duplicate switch blocks removed

accepted_candidate_records.title: Revisit PAD_STACK after source-structure cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR2609 removed PAD_STACK(48) from it_8026EECC while the function reached a reported 100.00% match. This supports treating stack padding as a narrow tactic to remove once cleaner source shape works.

source_update_candidates.title: itdraw.c marked Matching after PR2609
source_update_candidates.text: PR2609 changed configure.py so Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/itdraw.c") became Object(Matching, "melee/it/itdraw.c").
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible path fact for current matching status history; curator should verify against current source before promoting.

source_update_candidates.title: itdraw symbol metadata adjusted in PR2609
source_update_candidates.text: PR2609 changed it_804D5168 at .sdata:0x804D5168 from size 0x8 to 0x4 and changed .sdata2:0x804DC6B0 from global it_804DC6B0 to local @275.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible symbol/path metadata history; curator should validate current symbols and ownership before promoting.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize that GET_ITEM must always replace gobj->user_data; this PR only shows it worked in several itdraw helper contexts.
Do not infer human reviewer approval details; no human review comments were loaded.
Do not promote the symbol metadata changes as a global data-section rule; the slice only supports these specific addresses in this PR.
